Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • description - (Required) (Updatable) The description assigned to the ZPR policy.
  • statements - (Required) (Updatable) Zero Trust Packet Routing policy statements for the policy.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • name - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
